description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) After being hit, uses <color=#28d9ed>Come Here, Hound</color> on the enemy with the lowest Max Health. Has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Petrified</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: (発動効果)ダメージを受けた後、最大HPが最も低い敵単体に<color=#28d9ed>【来て、ハウンド】</color>を使用する。<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象に<color=#28d9ed>石化</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: (발동 효과) 피격 후 최대 체력이 가장 낮은 적에게 <color=#28d9ed>와줘, 하운드</color>를 사용합니다. <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>석화</color>를 부여합니다.
description.zh: (触发效果)受到攻击后,使生命值上限最低的敌人使用<color=#28d9ed>来吧,哈恩德</color>。有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>石化</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

name.jp: パンデモニウムのために!

description.en: Reduces the target's <color=#28d9ed>buff</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>, then attacks an enemy.
description.jp: 対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>の持続ターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させた後、敵単体にダメージを与える。
description.kr: 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color> 지속 턴을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킨 후 적을 공격합니다.
description.zh: 使目标的<color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>持续回合数减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>后,攻击敌人。

name.en: Is... Is it to your liking...?

description.en: (Passive)\nInflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on a random target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> at the start of the turn.\nIncreases Priority by <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> when a bleeding target finishes their action.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nターン開始時、ランダムな対象に<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を付与する。\n出血対象の行動終了時、行動ゲージが<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>UPする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n턴 시작시 랜덤한 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 부여합니다.\n출혈 대상 행동 종료 시 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> 증가 합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n回合开始时,对随机目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n出血目标行动结束时,行动值增加<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>。

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Light

description.en:
Always increases Penetration by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and Critical Hit Chance by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.

Grants <color=#28d9ed>Continuous Recovery</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color> at the start of battle (Irremovable).
Reduces enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color> at the end of the turn.
description.jp:
常時貫通力が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、会心率が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。

戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>持続回復</color>を付与する。(解除不可)
ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>DOWNさせる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>을 부여합니다. (해제 불가)
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
穿透力始终提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,暴击率始终提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>

战斗开始时,赋予<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。(无法解除)
回合结束时,敌队CP减少<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
